Subject: Apology for Delay in Payment  

Dear Ms. Yoyo,  

I hope this message finds you well. I would like to apologize for the delay in processing your payment. We appreciate your understanding and have successfully transferred 6480 USD to the ApoStar IBAN account.  

Please find the payment receipt attached in this email. If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to contact me.  

Thank you for your patience.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Company]
